range.timezoneNote: GA4 event_date table suffix. v138 GTM publish was 2026-04-24 23:45 KST.

definitions.npayAddPaymentInfo: GA4 add_payment_info with pay_method=npay, NPAY transaction_id, or npay page evidence. This is intent/click, not confirmed purchase.
definitions.npayPurchaseLike: GA4 purchase with pay_method=npay or transaction_id starting NPAY. Before v138 this can be NPay click-as-purchase pollution.
definitions.npayMpRecoveryPurchase: GA4 purchase with npay_recovery_source/payment_method/event_id from server MP recovery tests, separated from click pollution.
